case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MARCO ANTONIO MANZO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANZO, MARCO ANTONIO $720.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $800.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
